response:
Here is a sample goodbye email to coworkers:

Dear Team,

I wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude to each of you for the opportunity to work alongside such a talented and dedicated group of individuals. I have learned so much and will always cherish the memories and experiences we've shared. I am grateful for the support and camaraderie that has made my time here so enjoyable. I will do everything I can to ensure a smooth transition and complete any outstanding tasks before my departure. I wish the team all the best for the future and appreciate the opportunity to have been a part of this team.

Best regards, [Your Name]
